display.purpose: Hero headline only. Oversized, heavy, and short.

headline.purpose: Major section claims and final conversion copy.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Hero entrance, graph drift, scroll parallax, and interaction feedback.

motion.name: trace-loop
motion.purpose: Animated dependency traversal on graph lines.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 50px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--lp-ink, oklch(16.8% 0.018 238)); color: oklch(97.8% 0.012 168); padding: 0 20px; font: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(22% 0.024 238); box-shadow: 0 10px 22px oklch(20% 0.02 238 / 0.14); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(67% 0.145 164 / 0.22); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Waitlist field with precise border and focus lift.
components.css: .ds-input-email { height: 50px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--lp-line, oklch(82% 0.035 184)); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--lp-panel, oklch(98.8% 0.009 168)); color: var(--lp-ink, oklch(16.8% 0.018 238)); padding: 0 16px; font: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; transition: border-color 170ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 170ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 170ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input-email::placeholder { color: oklch(64% 0.018 212); } .ds-input-email:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--lp-line-strong, oklch(47% 0.112 174)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(67% 0.145 164 / 0.18); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.css: .ds-chip-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--lp-line, oklch(82% 0.035 184)); border-radius: 4px; color: var(--lp-ink-soft, oklch(36% 0.024 238)); padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Landing Nav
components.description: Fixed paper topbar with compact product confidence.
components.css: .ds-nav { height: 58px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; padding: 0 28px; background: oklch(96.8% 0.014 168 / 0.93); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lp-line, oklch(82% 0.035 184)); } .ds-wordmark { color: var(--lp-ink, oklch(16.8% 0.018 238)); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-button { margin-left: auto; height: 34px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--lp-ink, oklch(16.8% 0.018 238)); color: oklch(97.8% 0.012 168); padding: 0 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-button:hover { background: oklch(22% 0.024 238); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Product Graph Shell
components.description: Animated product preview surface that should guide the app redesign.
components.css: .ds-graph-shell { min-height: 260px; border: 1px solid var(--lp-line, oklch(82% 0.035 184)); border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(82% 0.035 184 / 0.36) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(82% 0.035 184 / 0.28) 1px, transparent 1px), oklch(98.1% 0.015 168 / 0.88); background-size: 36px 36px; box-shadow: 0 34px 92px oklch(28% 0.035 185 / 0.16); overflow: hidden; } .ds-graph-topbar { height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 22px; padding: 0 18px; background: oklch(98.8% 0.009 168 / 0.96); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lp-line, oklch(82% 0.035 184)); color: var(--lp-ink, oklch(16.8% 0.018 238)); font-size: 13px; } .ds-graph-node { width: 128px; margin: 84px auto; border: 1px solid var(--lp-line, oklch(82% 0.035 184)); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--lp-panel, oklch(98.8% 0.009 168)); padding: 13px 14px; color: var(--lp-ink, oklch(16.8% 0.018 238)); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; box-shadow: 0 5px 10px oklch(32% 0.04 185 / 0.08); }

narrative.overview: Pathwise should feel like a precise learning map laid on tinted drafting paper: quiet, technical, and alive. The landing page proves the product by letting the graph become the atmosphere. It is not a marketing decoration; it is the interface behaving as brand.
keyCharacteristics: Product-first hero: the animated skill-tree background carries the page.
Technical paper surfaces: off-white, gridded, tinted, never pure white.
Hard-working typography: large, heavy, compact, and direct.
Precision accents: green, amber, coral, and blue have named jobs.
Motion with purpose: show traversal, dependency, and progress.

rules.name: The Graph Color Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, coral, and blue are state colors first. Do not use them as random decorative fills.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure white and pure black are forbidden. Every neutral should carry a small hue bias toward the Pathwise paper or graphite family.

rules.name: The No-Decorative-Type Rule
rules.body: Do not use gradient text, italic display flourishes, typewriter fonts, or monospace as a shortcut for technical.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Most surfaces are separated by lines, grid, contrast, and spacing. Shadows are earned by interaction or signature product preview.

dos: Do make the graph the first visual signal. The product visualization is not a supporting illustration.
Do use Drafting Paper, Hairline Teal, and Blueprint Ink as the default interface foundation.
Do use motion to explain traversal, dependency, progress, and state.
donts: Don't use generic AI product sites: blue-purple gradients, glowing orbs, glassmorphism, or "the future is here" hero copy.
Don't make Pathwise feel like gamified learning apps (Duolingo-style): streaks, badges, confetti, excessive color, or childlike illustration.
Don't redesign the app with the old dashboard palette as the reference. The landing page is the new visual target.
